repository.note: There is no default package repository, this should be implied from namespace.

namespace_definition.native_name: The url path to the git host
namespace_definition.note: The source host for the git repository. See: https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone.html#_git_urls

name_definition.note: The path on the host to the git repository. See: https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone.html#_git_urls

version_definition.note: The version is a git reference (https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2/Git-Internals-Git-References). Ideally a commit or tag.
